_comment: Tests booking-verb routing, HICAPS response including sports/deep tissue carve-out, and YES handler guard for Totally Well.

scenarios.name: Booking verb during info session routes out silently

history.content: Can you help with post-surgery swelling?

Post-surgical care with lymphatic drainage is a great approach for reducing swelling and supporting recovery. We offer initial and return sessions with Rosario and Tanya. Is there anything else I can help you with?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='info_answered' with info_pivot_source='node_8' and implied_service set (Post Surgical Care), zero spoken output. FAIL if agent says anything before the tool call.

scenarios.name: HICAPS answer includes sports deep tissue carve-out for Bartosz

history.content: Do you accept private health insurance?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent says most services are HICAPS-eligible but specifically notes that Sports and Deep Tissue services with Bartosz are not HICAPS-claimable. FAIL if agent gives a blanket HICAPS yes without the carve-out.

scenarios.name: YES HANDLER — bare affirmative after answer prompts Go ahead

history.content: Yes, Rosario offers pregnancy massage as a 60-minute session. Is there anything else I can help you with?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent speaks 'Go ahead.' and halts. FAIL if agent calls universal_router or attempts booking routing.
